title: Return more information regarding views
excerpt:

posts.author: matt.schoessling (Matt Schoessling)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great if we could return items/columns based on board views or get the ids of the items/columns in a view when returning view information from a board.

That way, instead of having to specify the exact columns and then filter items within code, api requests can just include the id of the view.

Thanks!
